SetStatus.description: Updated Zod enum with past-tense status values replacing present-participle forms

SET_TRANSITIONS.signature: { pending: ['discussed', 'planned'], discussed: ['planned'], planned: ['executed'], executed: ['complete'], complete: ['merged'], merged: [] }
SET_TRANSITIONS.description: Updated transition map using past-tense status keys and values

migrateState.description: Idempotent migration function that renames old -ing status values to past-tense equivalents in STATE.json

atomic-rename.description: All occurrences of discussing/planning/executing must be renamed in a single atomic operation; partial rename causes Zod validation crashes

migration-idempotent.description: migrateState() must be safe to call multiple times on the same state object without side effects

backward-compatible-read.description: readState() must transparently migrate old status values before Zod validation so existing STATE.json files load without error
